departments.overview: The Department of Architecture in the Faculty of Engineering at Daffodil International University aims at a curriculum befitting the contemporary information technology and to produce skilled architects. The program's undergraduate level is broad based covering the shared values and expertise of other departments in the university, while gradually building on its own specialization.

departments.eligibility: Having minimum 2.5 GPA both in Secondary School Certificate (SSC) and Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) with a total GPA of 7.00 and having minimum 'C' grade in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics and English.

departments.overview: The BA (Hons) in English is an outstanding program providing students with an opportunity to learn English in a congenial environment. The BA in English syllabus combines English Literature, Language and Linguistics with broad general background. This program is also designed for foundation training for the school and college level teachers.

departments.department: Bachelor of Tourism and Hospitality Management
departments.degree: Bachelor of Tourism and Hospitality Management
departments.overview: The BTHM program provides education and training to produce skilled manpower for tourism and hospitality industry. The program involves providing services to other businesses as well as final consumers.
waiver_info: Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota
departments.eligibility: A higher secondary certificate or its equivalent in Science, Arts, Commerce or other fields of study. The basic educational requirement for admission having at least 2.5 GPA in both SSC & HSC level may apply for admission. 0 level students completing five O-level subjects and at least two A-level subjects out of these 7 subjects must have minimum 'B' grade 3rd C grade
labs: Food Safety, Hygiene, and Sanitation Lab
curriculum_highlights: History of the Emergence of Bangladesh
career_opportunities: Careers exist for graduates from hospitality-related disciplines in managing hotels, restaurants, public houses, conference centers, accommodation and catering operations, as well as in customer services' management across a range of industries.

The leisure industry also covers sport and entertainment and additional avenues of employment in sport and fitness centers, cinemas and theatres as well as other leisure venues such as bowling alleys and theme parks. Other customer service focused roles in tour and travel management and events management may also be of interest.
Careers like travel agency manager or travel consultant, tour manager, guide or tour escort, and tour operator are also available.
May become an entrepreneur in the service industry like Tour Entrepreneur, Club Entrepreneur, Travel Consultant, Events Manager, Restaurant / Hotel Owner etc.
departments.intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec

Besides the classroom, students engage in co-curricular and extracurricular activities, seminars and study tours, to enhance vital soft skills such as communication and leadership.

departments.overview: The Department of Innovation and Entrepreneurship was established in 2015 with the vision of creating a sustainable entrepreneurial ecosystem in the country driven by the innovation and creativity of local entrepreneurs. Its mission is to create young leaders in the society who will be able to solve the social problems or fulfill the needs and wants of their targeted people. It aims at providing a platform to develop relevant entrepreneurial skills through practical assignment and project work and elevating the growth of new business through continuous support. Moreover, to become successful entrepreneurs or job holders, the department provides all support to the students such as mentoring, funding, co-working space, industry network and practical focused course curriculum.

departments.overview: Bachelor of Public Health (BPH) is an undergraduate degree program focusing on promoting and protecting the health and well-being of communities and populations. The field of public health is multidisciplinary, drawing from various disciplines such as epidemiology, biostatistics, environmental health, social and behavioral sciences, health policy, and management. The BPH program provides a comprehensive understanding of these disciplines and their application to public health practice with the hospital visits, thesis projects and internships.

departments.intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec

departments.overview: The Department of Marketing at Daffodil International University is highly respected both locally and globally for its exceptional student satisfaction. The department is a hub of innovation, dedicated to shaping the future business leaders and professionals through a variety of courses, workshops, and seminars tailored to the modern marketing and digital marketing landscapes.
waiver_info: Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota
departments.eligibility: Students having a minimum GPA of 2.5 in SSC and HSC or equivalent background from any group may apply for admission in the BBA in Marketing. Completing GCE O'Level subjects and at least two A'Level subjects (at least GPA 2.0) are also considered for admission. Candidates who have completed higher secondary education (12 years of schooling) and proficiency in English are eligible to apply. Candidates with break of study more than two years are eligible to apply subject to pre-requisite study for break of study.
curriculum_highlights: Introduction to Sales and Retail Management
Personal Selling and Sales Force Management
departments.intake: Spring: Jan-Apr | Summer: May-Aug | Fall: Sep-Dec

departments.overview: The Masters of Social Science (MSS) in Journalism, Media and Communication is a two-year program divided into six semesters, each consisting of a duration of four months. The total credits for the program are 54. The courses are a combination of both theoretical and practical learning.
waiver_info: Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota
departments.eligibility: Graduating with minimum BSS/BS/Com/BSc or equivalent degree are eligible to apply with minimum CGPA 2.50 or equivalent.
facilities: Comprehensive Curriculum: A well-structured & exclusive two-year masters program covering essential aspects of journalism, media, and communication.
Qualified Faculty: Experienced PhD degree holder and industry professional instructors dedicated to providing quality education and mentorship.
Interactive Learning: Courses designed to integrate theoretical knowledge with practical skills for engaging learning experiences.
Admission Accessibility: Eligibility for graduates holding various bachelor's degrees, ensuring inclusivity.
Thesis/ Project/Industry Attachment/Comprehensive: Opportunities for practical application and research through a dedicated 4-credit-hour component.
Flexibility: Choice-based options in certain semesters, allowing students to tailor learning experiences to their interests.
Career Preparation: Equipping students with skills and knowledge essential for thriving in diverse media and communication contexts.
departments.contact: Admission Helpline: 880 961 7001512, admission@daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, www.daffodiluniversity.edu.bd, Daffodil Smart City, Birulia, Savar, Dhaka-1216
departments.intake: Spring: Jan-Apr / Summer: May-Aug / Fall: Sep-Dec

departments.overview: This discipline covers robot design, automation, AI integration, machine control, and smart system development—skills that are essential for future industries.
departments.waiver_info: Waiver/Scholarship Facilities of DIU: Result-based waiver (Bachelor's), Waiver on SGPA (Semester result), Female quota, Need-based, Player quota, Physically challenged/specially-abled, tribal/ethnic group quota, Sibling/spouse and son/daughter of current students quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission quota, Freedom fighter quota, And many more.
departments.eligibility: Students having a minimum 2.5 GPA both in Secondary School Certificate (SSC) and Higher Secondary Certificate (HSC) 12 class passed. Equivalent to two A-level subjects and at least two A-level subjects may apply. Out of these 5 subjects, applicants must have a minimum 4 'B' grade & 3 'C' grade respectively. The applicants must have Physics and Mathematics both at O-level and A-level.
curriculum_highlights: Fundamentals of Electrical and Electronic Engineering
